title: SpongeVanilla for SpongeGames
description: Official modpack of SpongeVanilla for SpongeGames server
body:
Hello! this Modpack was created for using it on our new Gamemode on SpongeGames, but you can use in Singleplayer or any other Server (Please don't confuse this with SpongePowered's VanillaGradle, this is a totally different project and we are not affiliated with them) it includes many Client-side mods for increasing performance and many other mods for a better adventure! Credits to:
[Starmute](https://github.com/Starmute) for [Terralith](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terralith) and [Incendium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/incendium) [(ps. we got permission from the author)](https://github.com/Starmute/terralith/issues/2#issuecomment-1159541395)
[Snownee](https://github.com/Snownee) for [Jade](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade)
[FoundationGames](https://github.com/FoundationGames) for [Automobility](https://github.com/FoundationGames/Automobility)
